post.summary: Head coach → assistant: broadcast play run so AC opens the position-after-play modal

example.message: Yardage play broadcast sent to assistant coach.

422.description: Caller not linked to a head coach group

message.example: Head coach group is not available for this user.

post.summary: Assistant coach → head coach: broadcast scoreboard context for System Suggestions

example.message: System suggestion broadcast sent to head coach.

403.description: Forbidden — caller is not an assistant coach

422.description: Validation error or assistant not linked to a head coach

message.example: Head coach is not linked to this assistant.

get.description: Returns every configuration entry as key and value.

put.description: Bulk upsert configuration entries by key.

post.description: Add a new configuration key. Key and value must contain only letters, numbers, and underscores. Value max length is 255.

get.summary: Get a single configuration by key
get.description: Returns one configuration entry for the given key.

get.summary: Get all devices for a league
get.description: Retrieve all devices configured for a specific league. Requires the league to belong to the authenticated head coach.

status.description: Lifecycle status (e.g. pending, registered, inactive; string for future values such as connected/disconnected)

403.description: League not owned by authenticated head coach

post.summary: Create a new device for a league
post.description: Create a new device and associate it with a league. Automatically generates a unique public `device_id` (QB-####), pairing code, and QR token. Requires the league to belong to the authenticated head coach.

403.description: League not owned by authenticated head coach

put.description: Update a device's properties. Can update device name, team association, or status. Requires the league to belong to the authenticated head coach.

status.description: Lifecycle status string (e.g. pending, registered, inactive)

403.description: League not owned by authenticated head coach

404.description: Device not found or not associated with this league

delete.summary: Delete a device from a league
delete.description: Remove a device from a league. If the device has an active session, it is logged out first. If the device is not associated with any other leagues, it is deleted. Requires the league to belong to the authenticated head coach.

403.description: League not owned by authenticated head coach

404.description: Device not found or not associated with this league

post.summary: Pair mobile session to a league device
post.description: Head coach scans the QR code displayed on the mobile app. Broadcasts `session.approved` to `qb-user.{session_id}` and `qb.session.updated` to `headcoach.{headCoachId}.league.{leagueId}.qb`.

Single logout endpoint for head coach dashboard and mobile app. Revokes device tokens, broadcasts `session.logout` to the mobile app and `qb.session.updated` with `is_loggin=false` to the web dashboard. Callable by the authenticated head coach or by the device itself (Sanctum device token).

post.summary: Login device with pairing code (FOR APP)
post.description: Authenticate device using 4-digit pairing code and session UUID. Issues Sanctum device token and broadcasts login event to head coach. FOR APP - Mobile device authentication endpoint.

get.summary: Logout device application by device ID (FOR APP)
get.description: Revokes device tokens, clears session_id, and broadcasts logout events to mobile app and head coach dashboard. FOR APP - Mobile device logout endpoint.

get.summary: Check device session login status (FOR APP)
get.description: Returns 200 when a device is bound to the given mobile session UUID. Returns 401 when no device has this session_id. FOR APP - Mobile device session check endpoint.

200.description: Device is linked to this session

logged_in.description: True if device has active Sanctum tokens

is_connected.description: True if device has active Sanctum tokens

active_match.description: Live scoreboard state when a game or practice match is running for this device's head coach; null when no match is active. Same shape as Pusher score.updated / practice.score.updated payloads.

401.description: Unauthenticated — no device with this session_id

put.description: Partial update: only fields included in the request body are changed. Omitted fields are left unchanged. Requires the league to belong to the authenticated head coach.

data.description: Updated league with teams, league_rule, and sport relations

404.description: League not found or not owned by the authenticated head coach

get.description: Returns plays for a league including `hmark_left`, `hmark_center`, and `hmark_right`. Pass `page`, `per_page`, or `search` to enable pagination.

post.description: Upload a new offensive play. Requires all three H-mark images (`hmark_left`, `hmark_center`, `hmark_right`). Note: route path uses legacy spelling `uplaod-play`.
Update an existing play. H-mark images are optional when existing paths are already stored; send new files to replace. `playType` is optional on update.

get.summary: List match plays with filters and sorting
get.description: Returns all plays for the league (offensive or defensive via `possession`), filtered by optional down, expectedyard, and search. `matchId` is used for RPP `total_score` sorting context. Multi-sort via `sort` (comma-separated `field:direction` pairs, applied left-to-right). Rate sorts use SQL ratios; `total_score` uses RPP matchup scoring (meaningful for offensive plays). Plays with zero attempts sort as 0% for rate fields. Offensive: pass `h_mark_position` (`hmark_left`, `hmark_center`, `hmark_right`; default `hmark_center`) — the response includes only `image` for that selection, not the other hmark columns. Defensive: uses the play `image` column.

parameters.name: possession
parameters.description: Offensive or defensive plays to return

parameters.name: h_mark_position
parameters.description: Offensive only: H-mark column used for response `image`

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Multi-column sort. Comma-separated clauses `field:direction` applied left-to-right. Allowed fields: play_success_rate, practice_success_rate, rain_success_rate, snow_success_rate, total_score. Directions: asc, desc. Max 5 clauses. Default (omitted): win_result desc.

get.summary: Get system-suggested plays for a match
get.description: Used from practice/play scoreboard **System Suggestion** flow (PlaySuggestion component). Returns raw `Play` / `DefensivePlay` JSON (not wrapped in status/message). Offensive: `{ top_by_score, top_by_success }`. Pass `h_mark_position` (`hmark_left`, `hmark_center`, `hmark_right`; default `hmark_center`) to set `image` from that H-mark column; other hmark fields are omitted. Defensive: uses play `image` column.

parameters.name: league
parameters.description: League id (same as route param `id` in /practice-mode/{id}/...)

parameters.name: league_id
parameters.description: Duplicate of path league id; sent by frontend

parameters.name: is_practice
parameters.description: true/1 for practice mode; false/0 for play mode

parameters.name: h_mark_position
parameters.description: Offensive only: H-mark column mapped to response `image` (same as match-plays)

parameters.name: down
parameters.description: Current down (1-4); maps to preferred_down filter

parameters.name: strategy
parameters.description: Scoreboard strategy value; maps to strategies column (FIND_IN_SET)

parameters.name: expectedyard
parameters.description: Expected yard gain from scoreboard; maps to min_expected_yard

parameters.name: zone
parameters.description: Legacy zone filter; sent by frontend but not applied in current offensive handler

parameters.name: quarter
parameters.description: Sent by frontend; not applied in current offensive handler

parameters.name: player
parameters.description: Selected offensive players from scoreboard (serialized as query params by the Vue client)

200.description: Suggested plays. Shape depends on possession.

YardagePlayToAssistantRequest.description: Exact JSON keys read by BroadCastScoreController::yardagePlaytoAssistant (Vue client may send `play`; stored in broadcast payload as `play`).

playYardageGain.description: Current ball position / yardage slider value

targetTeam.description: Possession / target team id or type from scoreboard

suggestionData.description: Scoreboard context when HC opened System Suggestions

playObject.description: Selected play object (Vue also sends `play` as alias)

message.example: Yardage play broadcast sent to assistant coach.
System suggestion broadcast sent to head coach.

offensive[40].description: Offensive position strength keyed by position id

defensive[70].description: Defensive position strength keyed by position id

ConfiguredOffensivePlay.description: Configured offensive play. Only `image` is returned for the diagram (from `h_mark_position`); hmark_left/center/right are not included in the response.

image.description: Single diagram path from the `h_mark_position` query param (hmark_left, hmark_center, or hmark_right; default hmark_center)

MatchPlaysBaseResponse.description: HTTP status conveys success or error; body is only data and meta.

MatchPlaySortField.description: Sort field keys for match-plays. Rate fields divide win counts by attempt counts (zero attempts = 0). total_score is RPP-based (offensive only; defensive sorts as 0).

SuggestedOffensivePlay.description: Offensive play enriched with RPP scoring, matchup breakdown, and result counts for the current match context.

image.description: Play diagram path from `h_mark_position` query param (default hmark_center). Only `image` is returned; hmark_left/center/right are not in the response.

total_score.description: RPP-based score used to rank suggestions

SuggestedOffensivePlaysResponse.description: Returned when possession is offensive (default). Up to 3 plays per bucket.

top_by_success.description: Ranked by historical win rate; practice uses practice_win_result when is_practice=true

SuggestedDefensivePlay.description: Defensive play suggestion returned when possession=defensive.

sanctum.description: Sanctum bearer token. Use format: Bearer {token}

tags.name: Broadcast
tags.description: Coach-group Pusher broadcasts between head coach and assistant coach

tags.name: Devices
tags.description: Device management per league for parallel game execution

tags.name: Plays
tags.description: Offensive play create, update, and listing (H-mark images). Includes configured game play lists, system-suggested plays for scoreboard/match flow, filtered by down and expected yardage.
